title: About - Leads University
markdown:
# About LEADS

Lahore Leads University is a comprehensive institution with a reputation for innovative programs and modern research activities. Our faculty, staff, programs, and services team provide an extensive range of learning choices and alternatives that offer an outstanding combination of quality education at all levels.

Lahore Leads University’s core strength lies in its academic

excellence. Lahore Leads University is nationally recognized as a

smoothly flourishing university, with a challenging academic

environment and student centered curricula. Students at LEADS

have the chance to work alongside outstanding professionals who

are accomplished scholars and committed teachers. The university

has a culture of research, innovation, openness, intercultural

harmony, and development. Lahore Leads University is committed

to encouraging and developing inquisitive minds and provides

ample learning opportunities for the students. Lahore Leads

University aims at inspiring students and urging them to look

beyond the boundaries and explore the avenues of knowledge to

their utmost potential.

Our academic staff is selected on the basis of their excellence in

teaching and research. We apply uniform high standards for all

departments and all campuses.

![convocation 2024](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/469801979_989130653248129_969393816057349373_n.jpg)

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/ABOUT-US-IMG-3.png)

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/ABOUT-US-IMG-2.png)

## Vision

To emerge as a seat of higher learning producing empowered and responsible leadership through holistic development of individuals in all domains of erudition, nation building, corporate realms, and public service

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/428669791_788538643307332_6309320555002416238_n.jpg)

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/ABOUT-US-IMG-1.png)

![de0070f077](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/de0070f077.jpg)

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/ABOUT-US-IMG-2.png)

![529857710_1179515250876334_7277156298717689430_n](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/529857710_1179515250876334_7277156298717689430_n.jpg)

## Mission

Creation of a serene environment conducive to learning, skill building, research, and innovation, thus, preparing individuals capable of meeting contemporary and future challenges in a highly dynamic mode

### Leads at a glance

- The Faculties Departments

The university consists of five faculties: Computer Sciences (CS & IT, Mathematics), Engineering (Electrical, Civil), Business Administration, Commerce (Economics), and Humanities & Social Sciences (Education, Law, English, Sports Sciences, Mass Communication, Sociology, Psychology, Urdu, Islamic Studies, Politics & IR). The Registrar, Controller of Examinants, and directorates ensure a favorable teaching and learning environment at LLU.

- Quest for excellence

LLU’s quest for academic excellence is based on five fundamental pillars ; the students, the faculty, the curriculum, the learning environment and the civil society we serve. We stand committed that in our academic offerings we shall not only follow the standards, we shall also set new records of excellence.

- The Responsibilities

The Faculties and their departments are responsible for:

- Determining the curriculum
- Organizing lectures, seminars and projects
- Setting and marking examinations
- Maintaining academic excellence and professionalism
- Providing an environment conducive to learning, teaching, academic inquiry and innovation

## Core Values

- Professional Excellence
- Dignity and Integrity
- Transparency and Accountability
- Sharing and Participation
- Social Responsibility
- Diversity and Inclusiveness
- Creativity and Innovation

[Learn More](https://leads.edu.pk/vision-and-mission/)

### Charter & Accreditations

Lahore Leads University is an HEC recognized private sector University, chartered by the Government of Punjab on January 22, 2011. It has created a name for itself in higher education in a short span of time. LLU is one of the speedily growing universities in Pakistan providing quality education with focus on academic excellence, innovation and up-to-date knowledge. LLU has purpose-built campuses, state-of-the-art facilities, and a learning environment where future Leaders are nurtured.

## History

The University was established in 2011 under the aegis of Leads Educator Welfare Trust, a nonprofit trust for promoting education throughout the country. Its aims at producing leaders for the nation through comprehensive development of individuals by providing quality education, brainstorming activities, experiential learning opportunities to analyze issues with different perspectives for the economic development of the country and for the better future of the nation. It has created a name for itself in the field of higher education in a short time period. Lahore Leads University is one of the fast growing private universities of Pakistan with diverse disciplines ranging from Business Administration and Engineering to Humanities and Social Sciences and Computer Sciences.

Lahore Leads University is a comprehensive institution with a reputation for innovative programs and modern research activities. Our faculty, staff, programs, and services team provide an extensive range of learning choices and alternatives that offer an outstanding combination of quality education at all levels.

## [Policies](https://leads.edu.pk/about-us/\#policies)

**Policies for Lahore LEADS University**

At Lahore LEADS University, accessible from leads.edu.pk, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Policies document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Lahore LEADS University and how we use it.

- **Under Academic Policy some imp points for students**

**CLASS ATTENDANCE**

Attendance of minimum 75% of the lectures/other academic exercises in a course shall be mandatory to sit in a semester examination.

**FINE FOR ABSENCE FROM A CLASS LAB SESSION WITHOUT APPROVED LEAVE:-**

1. Undergraduate students A fine for absence without duly Approved Leave shall be payable by the concerned student @ Rs. 100/- per Class Session.

b. Graduate and Postgraduate Students A fine for absence without duly approved leave shall be payable by the concerned student @ Rs. 200/- per Class Session.

c. Re-admission Fee due to suspension / drop on account of Absence without Duly Approved Leave after registration in a semester A student dropped from the rolls of the University on account of absence without duly approved leave after registration in a semester (in any program) shall be required to pay Rs. 10,000/- as Re-admission Fee together with due fine for the absence period.

**List of Policies**

1. [**Academic Policy**](https://leads.edu.pk/OWEBBK24AUG23/pdf/academic%20policy.pdf)
2. [**HR Policy**](https://leads.edu.pk/OWEBBK24AUG23/pdf/HR%20Policy.pdf)
3. [**Policy on Sexual Harassment**](https://leads.edu.pk/OWEBBK24AUG23/pdf/Policy%20on%20Sexual%20Harassment.pdf)
4. [**Data Protection Policy**](https://leads.edu.pk/OWEBBK24AUG23/pdf/Data%20Protection%20Policy.pdf)
5. [**Plagiarism Policy**](https://leads.edu.pk/OWEBBK24AUG23/pdf/Plagiarism%20Policy.pdf)
6. [**HEC Policy Disabilities**](https://leads.edu.pk/OWEBBK24AUG23/pdf/HEC-Policy-Disabilities.pdf)
7. [**HEC Policy on Drugs and Tobacco Abuse in HEIs (2021)**](https://leads.edu.pk/OWEBBK24AUG23/pdf/HEC%20-%20Policy%20on%20Drugs%20and%20Tobacco%20Abuse%20in%20HEIs%20(2021).pdf)
8. **Students Fee Concession and Award of Scholarships**

The LLU Fee Concession & Scholarship Policy has the following features:

1. Merit Scholarship for First Semester Students
2. Merit Scholarship for Subsequent Semesters
3. Fee Concession for Needy students.
4. Fee Concession for siblings.
5. Policy for LLU Employees and Their Dependents
6. Fee in Installments
7. Merit Scholarship for First Semester Students

1.1      Any student who gets admission after the due date of fee deposit / scheduled test date / commencement of the semester, shall not be entitled to get merit scholarship in the first semester.

1.2       Students falling under clause 1.2 will be allowed to compete for merit scholarship in the subsequent semesters.

1.3       A student who changes the program of study will not be entitled for merit scholarship in the first semester.

1.4      In addition, fee waivers to position holders of BISE examination / Diploma holders are admissible in the first semester as follows:

100% tuition fee waiver to first position holder

75% tuition fee waiver to second position holder

50% tuition fee waiver to third position holder

1.5       Tuition fee waivers are also allowed in the first semester to the students admitted on A-level basis.

Three A’s in A-Level            50%tuition fee waiver

Two A’s in A-Level               25%tuition fee waiver

1.6       This award is only for the first semester. For subsequent semesters, the students would have to compete according to following scheme.

**Merit Scholarship for Subsequent Semesters**

2.1      Scholarship awarded at the time of admission will remain same in first two semesters. Scholarship will be revised in the third semester and onward in every semester on the basis of achieved CGPA mentioned in section 2 of 2.2.

2.2       Merit scholarship will be awarded (in the tuition fee only) according to the following criteria:

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Required CGPA | Tuition Fee Waive | Scholarship Title |
| 3.9 – 4.0 | 70% | Exceptional |
| 3.6 – 3.8 | 50% | Distinction |
| 3.0 – 3.5 | 40% | Admirable |
| Less than 3.0 | 20 % |  |

**\*This pattern will not applicable on LLB (5 Years) and Pharm.D**

2.3       A student shall have to pass all the courses described in the scheme of studies (of previous semester) in order to qualify for the merit scholarship for next semester.

2.3       A student must score at least 3 CGPA (out of 4) in order to compete for this merit scholarship.

2.4       In case of tie, decision would be made on the basis of %age of total marks obtained in the final examination (of previous semester).

2.5       The students who have frozen a semester or have dropped / withdrawn a course or have repeated a course / semester are not eligible to compete for this merit scholarship.

2.6       Immaculate character is the foremost requirement for merit scholarship. The students with record of disciplinary action against them are not eligible for this award.

2.7       If a student must have maintained

**Fee Concession for Need Based**

3.1       If a student shall not score at least 3.0 CGPA (out of 4), the scholarship already awarded on need based will be revised according to the decision of the committee in the section 3 of 3.3.

3.2       Scholarship awarded at the time of admission will remain same in first two semesters. Scholarship will be revised in the third semester and onward in every semester on the bases of CGPA.

3.3       The university is providing fee concession to needy students. Such concessions are to be decided on case-to-case basis. Students would be required to apply for need-based scholarship in prescribed format. Following information would be required.

- Family income
- Parents alive or deceased
- Number of siblings
- Residential locality
- House owned or rented, covered area
- Family utilities bills and
- Type of vehicle(s) owned by the family

A committee will conduct interviews and decide the fee concession allowance in 25%, 50% or 75% tuition fee waiver.

**Fee Concession for Siblings**

The LLU allows fee concession to siblings who are enrolled in the university. Such concession is granted as per following scheme:

4.1       If two siblings are studying in LLU then

One will get 50% fee concession

One will pay full fee

If three siblings are studying in LLU then

One will get 100% fee concession

Two will pay full fee

If four siblings are studying in LLU then

One will get 100% fee concession

One will get 50% fee concession

Two will pay full fee

If five siblings are studying in LLU then

Two will get 100% fee concession

Three will pay full fee

4.2       The sibling getting brother/sister concession, cannot apply for need base fee concession. However the siblings not getting this concession can be granted, at the most, 50% fee concession if they deserve this on the basis of need.

4.3       Fee concession will be granted to those siblings who are                   expected to complete their programs of studies earlier.

4.4       If the brother/sister who is expected to complete his/her study program earlier as per schedule of studies, is getting merit scholarship, then the other sibling will avail the brother/sister concession.

4.5       A student can avail only one form of financial assistance at one time.

**Policy for LLU Employees and Their Dependents**

Fee concession policy for the LLU employees and their dependents studying in different courses/programs of studies is as follows:

5.1       This policy shall apply to the employees of the University and their sons, daughters and spouses.

5.2       The employees shall have the benefit of 50%tuition fee concession.

5.3       Sons, daughters and spouse of an LLU employee (if dependent on the employee) will have the benefit of 50% fee concession.

5.4       Concession (if granted) would apply to tuition fee only.

5.5       Awardees of these concessions would be required to maintain CGPA at or above 3.00

**Fee in Installments**

The university may allow deposit of fee in two or three equal installments to those students who cannot deposit the semester fee in lump sum.
